name: find_free_slot
description: Finds available meeting time slots where all specified attendees are free within a given date range. Respects working hours constraints and returns a list of candidate time windows matching the requested duration.

attendees.description: List of attendee email addresses whose calendars should be checked for availability.
attendees.$comment: At least one attendee required. Server must have calendar read access for all specified attendees.

duration_minutes.description: The required duration of the meeting slot in minutes.
duration_minutes.$comment: Minimum of 5 minutes prevents trivially short meeting requests. Maximum of 480 (8 hours) limits full-day blocks.

date_range_start.description: The earliest date (ISO 8601 date string) to begin searching for free slots.
date_range_start.$comment: Date-only format (YYYY-MM-DD) used to define the range boundary; time boundaries controlled by working_hours_only.

date_range_end.description: The latest date (ISO 8601 date string) by which the meeting must end.
date_range_end.$comment: Inclusive end date. Must be on or after date_range_start.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier used to interpret working hours and display returned slots.
timezone.$comment: Timezone affects working hours interpretation; critical for cross-timezone scheduling.

working_hours_only.description: If true, restricts free slot search to standard working hours (09:00–17:00 in the specified timezone) and excludes weekends.
working_hours_only.$comment: Defaults to true for professional scheduling use cases. Set false for urgent or 24/7 team coordination.
